ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Continued To Feb-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kurt Huysentrusyt appeared via zoom for Wellman Wu (petitioner).

The Court noted that this matter does not qualify for a small estate. Mr. Huysentrusyt expressed that he will file a second amended petition stating that all assets were descendants' community property. The matter is continued to February 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Visiting Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Off Calendar Sep-11-2023 Continued To Nov-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt appeared by zoom for Wellman Wu (petitioner).

Mr. Huysentruyt stated the petition has been filed in the related matter on the estate case and will file an amended petition. Petition for final distribution on waiver of account etc., is continued to November 07, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bastain. Not reported.
